Metadata.description: Spectr is a technology and manufacturing company focused on security, military, logistics, and critical infrastructure.

Products.title: Products
Products.heroDescription: VALKYRIE for field reconnaissance. CENTURION for mission command. Built and controlled from Norway.
Products.valkyrieExtra: VALKYRIE is affordable to field, highly effective in reconnaissance, and built for long-range operation — aligning sensing requirements, operator workflow, and field support around each deployment.
Products.specSheetDescription: Full platform overview, dimensions, operating profile, and recommended equipment for VALKYRIE.

About.title: About Us
About.builtFor: We build the machine that builds the machine.
About.paragraph1: Spectr is an engineering company first. We do not outsource the hard parts. Our team designs, manufactures, and flies autonomous aerial systems from first principles — PCB to airframe, firmware to mission software.
About.paragraph2: Every engineer here learns the full stack: schematic capture and layout, CAD and structural analysis, CNC and additive manufacturing, vacuum forming, assembly, test, and field deployment. That is how you ship hardware that survives contact with reality.

manufacturing.name: Where We Build Engineers
manufacturing.text: We run an in-house pipeline from concept to physical product. Engineers train on PCB design and layout, parametric CAD, structural simulation, CNC machining, industrial 3D printing, and vacuum-form tooling. No handoffs to anonymous suppliers. You own the drawing, the toolpath, and the first article off the line.

platforms.name: What We Build
platforms.text: Autonomous UAV platforms engineered for military operations — long-range reconnaissance, persistent overwatch, and mission-configurable payloads. Airframes, propulsion, sensing, and autonomy designed as one integrated system. Built in Norway. Tested against real operational constraints, not slide decks.

avionics.name: Brains & Nervous System
avionics.text: Onboard flight computers, custom flight controllers, power-dense battery packs, and a full avionics stack — designed, built, and iterated in-house. Above that sits our AI intelligence and decision engine: sensor fusion, autonomous routing, threat-aware path planning, and operator-in-the-loop command. Hardware and software share the same engineers. That is the only way it works.

2024.title: Early systems work
2024.text: Spectr began with a focus on practical aerial systems, field handling, and hardware that could support real operational workflows.

2025.title: VALKYRIE takes shape
2025.text: The team refined a mission-configurable reconnaissance UAV direction around sensing, operator needs, and deployment support.

2026.title: Operational readiness
2026.text: Spectr continues building toward reliable aerospace systems and software-assisted field operations from Norway.

Careers.title: Join Our Mission
Careers.intro: Spectr is building mission-ready aerospace systems and operational software from Norway.
Careers.paragraph1: We are looking for people who care about practical engineering, disciplined execution, and technology that can hold up outside the lab.
Careers.paragraph2: If you want to work across aerospace hardware, operator workflow, and secure software systems, we want to hear from you.

Security.title: Security
Security.description: Spectr security, confidentiality, Norwegian ownership, and controlled infrastructure commitments.
Security.legalText1: Our operations are structured in accordance with the Norwegian Security Act (sikkerhetsloven) and the Business Security Regulation (virksomhetsikkerhetsforskriften § 83). We maintain organisational and technical safeguards for classified information and critical infrastructure under Norwegian law.
Security.legalText2: We believe critical technology should be developed, owned, and controlled locally — to safeguard Norwegian interests for the long term.
Security.nationalControl: We believe critical technology should be developed under full national control.

Investor.title: Investor Relations
Investor.intro: Follow Spectr's company updates, operating milestones, and long-term aerospace systems roadmap.
Investor.headline: Building durable aerospace capability from Norway.
Investor.paragraph1: Spectr is developing mission-ready UAV hardware and operational software for organizations that need reliable field technology, secure control, and long-term product depth.
Investor.paragraph2: Investor relations inquiries are handled directly by the Spectr team. We share company materials, milestone updates, and strategic context with qualified stakeholders.
Investor.quote: Norwegian-owned technology for observation, command, and field operations — built to stay under national control.
